name: CraftForms
author: Vitalii Kiiko
description: CraftForms is a comprehensive tool for building web forms of any complexity! Build forms visually using Gutenberg editor.
changelog:
1.1.4

  • Improved: booking related settings, added from/until number of days datepicker availability
  • Added: Elementor and Bricks native widgets/elements
  • Added: submit action
• Fixed: a bug in the file upload field
